action_breakdown:
# Shot 03 stepFlow - Single-Shot Certification Asset

## Source timing

- Shot ID: shot_03
- Scene type: stepFlow
- Reference clip: C:\Users\Administrator\.codex\references\extracted-shots\shot_03_stepFlow_5.2-14.9.mp4
- Actual start time in source video: 5.200s
- Actual end time in source video: 14.934s
- Duration: 9.734s
- Certification status: candidate only; approved=false; allowedInFactory=false

## Visual hierarchy

1. Background layer: bright white/pale workflow surface with shallow depth. Reusable version keeps the clean operating surface but removes brand-specific UI.
2. Main flow line: horizontal process rail connecting multiple steps. This is the structural anchor of the shot.
3. Step cards: 3-5 compact task cards arranged along the rail. Each card represents a generic workflow stage.
4. Active step focus: one highlighted step/card receives focus and a semantic glow. It should guide attention rather than decorate.
5. Tool/icon layer: a brief capability icon or module card rises near the active step to imply automation.
6. Progress/metric layer: final compact progress meter or status card confirms the flow outcome.

## Element timing, direction, speed, settle

- 0%-100% / stepBackdropDrift: background drifts very gently with shallow scale. Continuous and low speed.
- 5%-30% / processLineDraw: process rail draws left-to-right. It should finish early to frame later actions.
- 18%-56% / stepCardsCascade: step cards enter in sequence from slight below and left. Medium speed with clean deceleration.
- 38%-68% / activeStepFocus: active step lifts slightly and receives one semantic focus outline. No repeated blinking.
- 52%-78% / toolIconLift: module/tool icon rises from lower-right near the focused step. Quick but restrained.
- 66%-88% / progressMeterReveal: progress card and meter reveal in place, implying measurable flow state.
- 86%-100% / stepFlowSettle: whole composition settles for readability.

## Reusable atomic motions

- stepBackdropDrift: soft process-stage parallax.
- processLineDraw: directional flow rail draw.
- stepCardsCascade: staged step/task cards reveal.
- activeStepFocus: semantic focus lift and outline.
- toolIconLift: capability/icon module rise.
- progressMeterReveal: metric/progress confirmation reveal.
- stepFlowSettle: final readability hold.

## Reference-only decoration to exclude

- Source product name, exact Chinese copy, application-specific icons, task labels, screenshots, and percentage values are excluded.
- Physical props or decorative confetti are not part of the reusable motion.
- Avoid tiny UI labels that become unreadable and avoid scattered floating cards with no flow connection.

## Choreography timeline

| Track | Motion | Target | Percent | Role | Library decision |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | stepBackdropDrift | stepBackdrop | 0-100 | depth-establish | candidate |
| 2 | processLineDraw | processRail | 5-30 | flow-structure | candidate |
| 3 | stepCardsCascade | stepCards | 18-56 | step-sequence-build | candidate |
| 4 | activeStepFocus | activeStep | 38-68 | semantic-step-focus | candidate |
| 5 | toolIconLift | toolModule | 52-78 | capability-proof | candidate |
| 6 | progressMeterReveal | progressMeter | 66-88 | outcome-proof | candidate |
| 7 | stepFlowSettle | fullComposition | 86-100 | readability-hold | candidate |

## QA notes

- Safe area: planned pass; rail, cards, icon, and progress meter remain inside 960x540 safe margins.
- Typography: planned pass; generic labels only, no source copy.
- Semantic shape: planned pass; each semantic element maps to a process/step/outcome role.
- Current approval: false.
- Current factory access: false.
